title: scaevola lobelia var. sericea
intro: Scaevola lobelia var. sericea, also known as Blue Fan Flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia and is part of the Goodenia family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the healing of wounds. Scaevola lobelia var. sericea is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in ointments and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
